query: SELECT id, productName, originalAngle FROM landingPages WHERE id = 900002 LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ve2VbkP4iEu522.root --database jQsGzEaS9E2xgaK8jEKUPB --execute SELECT id, productName, originalAngle FROM landingPages WHERE id = 900002 LIMIT 1;

{"asSeenIn": ["Trusted by aspiring coaches in 30+ countries"], "consultationOutline": [{"description": "Get fully certified in the proprietary 12-session protocol that combines neuroscience, HRV biofeedback, and nervous system regulation. You'll know exactly what to do in every session to create measurable, lasting transformation - no guesswork.", "title": "Complete Mind-Heart Activation Protocol Certification"}, {"description": "Master the technology that sets you apart: Heart Rate Variability tracking that lets clients measure their nervous system shifts in real-time. Turn subjective feelings into objective data that proves transformation and justifies premium fees.", "title": "HRV Biofeedback Technology Training"}, {"description": "Receive the complete session-by-session roadmap with detailed facilitator guides, client worksheets, assessments, and progress tracking tools. Deploy immediately with your next client - everything is ready to use.", "title": "Done-For-You 12-Session Client System"}, {"description": "Learn exactly how to position yourself as a certified specialist (not a generic coach) and justify $400-$600+ per session fees. Includes pricing psychology, package structures, and value communication strategies that eliminate price objections.", "title": "Premium Pricing and Positioning Framework"}, {"description": "Get word-for-word scripts for discovery calls that enroll premium clients. You'll know exactly how to present the Mind-Heart Activation Protocol, handle objections, and close $3,000-$7,500 packages with confidence.", "title": "High-Ticket Consultation Scripts"}, {"description": "Receive complete onboarding templates, welcome sequences, session scheduling systems, and retention strategies that keep clients engaged through the full 12-session protocol. Reduce no-shows and maximize completion rates.", "title": "Client Onboarding and Retention Systems"}, {"description": "Get done-for-you marketing materials that communicate your unique methodology: website copy templates, social media content, email sequences, and educational content that positions you as the only coach who offers measurable results.", "title": "Marketing Templates and Positioning Assets"}, {"description": "Understand the science behind why traditional coaching fails and how the Mind-Heart Activation Protocol creates lasting change by rewiring nervous system patterns. You'll confidently explain the methodology to skeptical prospects.", "title": "Neurological Change Methodology Training"}, {"description": "Follow the step-by-step business launch roadmap that takes you from certification to first paying clients in 30 days. Includes client attraction strategies, launch timelines, and momentum-building tactics that fill your practice fast.", "title": "Practice Launch Accelerator System"}, {"description": "Join the exclusive community of certified Mind-Heart Activation coaches with monthly group coaching, protocol updates, advanced training modules, and peer support. You're never alone in building your practice.", "title": "Ongoing Certification Community and Support"}], "eyebrowHeadline": "FOR ASPIRING COACHES WHO FEEL LIKE 'JUST ANOTHER COACH'", "insiderAdvantages": {"content": "Here's what makes the Mind-Heart Activation Protocol impossible to replicate:

It's the only coaching certification that integrates HRV biofeedback technology with a complete client transformation system. Your clients track their nervous system regulation in real-time using their smartphone - turning subjective 'feelings' into objective data that proves transformation.

You get the complete 12-session protocol with detailed session plans, client worksheets, assessment tools, and progress tracking dashboards. Nothing is left to guesswork. You know exactly what to do in session 1, session 6, and session 12 to create lasting change.

Plus, you receive the full business launch system that coaches pay $5,000+ to consultants to create: positioning strategies that differentiate you from generic coaches, pricing frameworks that justify premium fees, consultation scripts that close high-ticket clients, and marketing templates that attract ideal clients who value measurable results.

This isn't a course you complete and then figure out on your own. This is your complete transformation from 'another coach' to certified specialist with a proprietary protocol - everything you need to launch or scale a premium coaching practice in 12 weeks.", "headline": "Unlock Insider Advantages: Built on Neuroscience Research and 10,000+ Client Sessions - Not Generic Coaching Theory"}, "mainHeadline": "Get Certified in the Mind-Heart Activation Protocol: How Coaches Charge Premium Fees Using Measurable HRV Results - In 12 Weeks, Guaranteed!", "primaryCTA": "Save Your Seat For The LIVE Training", "problemAgitation": {"content": "You know the feeling, Sarah. Your client is making incredible progress. They're finally breaking through. The breakthroughs feel real this time. Then 60 days later, they're right back where they started - and you have no idea why.

Meanwhile, you're charging $150 per session while other coaches with no more training than you command $500+ per hour. You've taken three different coaching certifications, read all the books, and you STILL feel like an imposter when someone asks what makes you different.

The worst part? You know you're capable of so much more. But without a proprietary system - something that's yours, something you can point to and say 'This is why I get results' - you're stuck competing on price while watching your clients cycle through the same patterns over and over. You're working twice as hard for half the income you deserve, and every failed client transformation chips away at your confidence a little more.", "headline": "Still Watching Your Clients Get Results... Then Relapse 8 Weeks Later?"}, "quizSection": {"correctAnswer": 4, "headline": "Can You Guess Which One of These 'Standard' Coaching Approaches… Actually Guarantees Your Clients Will Relapse Within 90 Days?", "options": ["Using positive affirmations and mindset work alone", "Weekly accountability check-ins without a systematic protocol", "Generic goal-setting frameworks from your certification course", "Motivational sessions that create temporary emotional highs", "All of the above - because none address the neurological patterns that drive behavior"], "revealText": "The truth? All of these approaches fail because they ignore what neuroscience proves: lasting change requires reprogramming both the nervous system AND the heart-brain connection. Without measuring and shifting HRV patterns, your clients will always default back to their old programming within 90 days - no matter how motivated they feel in your sessions. That's why the Mind-Heart Activation Protocol combines neuroscience with HRV biofeedback to create measurable, lasting transformation your clients can see in real-time."}, "scarcityUrgency": {"content": "We're hosting a live webinar training where you'll discover exactly how the Mind-Heart Activation Protocol works - and how you can become certified to use it in your practice.

But here's the catch: We limit each training to 200 participants so everyone can get their questions answered live. Once we hit capacity, registration closes.

Why attend live instead of waiting for a replay? Three reasons:

First, we're revealing the complete 12-session protocol framework - the exact system certified coaches use to create measurable, lasting transformations. This is only shown on live trainings.

Second, you'll see a real HRV biofeedback demonstration showing how clients track their nervous system shifts in real-time. This technology is the secret to justifying premium pricing.

Third, attendees who stay until the end receive exclusive access to our certification program at a significant discount - an offer that's only available to live participants.

Seats are filling fast as we approach the training date. Don't wait until the last minute and risk missing out. Save your seat now while registration is still open.", "headline": "This LIVE Webinar Training Is Only Available on [DATE] - Secure Your Seat Before We're At Capacity"}, "shockingStatistic": {"content": "The International Coaching Federation tracks income data across certified coaches worldwide. The numbers are sobering:

87% of certified coaches earn less than $50,000 annually. 64% work a second job to support their coaching practice. And 43% quit within three years because they can't differentiate themselves or justify premium pricing.

The reason? They're competing in an oversaturated market with no proprietary system to stand out. They're the same as 70,000 other coaches offering the same generic services at the same commodity prices.

Meanwhile, coaches with proprietary protocols and measurable methodologies command $400-$600+ per session and build six-figure practices within 18-24 months. The difference isn't talent or certification - it's having a unique mechanism clients can't get anywhere else.

Don't become another statistic. The coaching industry doesn't need another generic coach. It needs specialists with proven systems that produce measurable results.", "headline": "87% of Certified Coaches Never Earn More Than $50,000 Per Year - Here's Why"}, "solutionIntro": {"content": "Here's what nobody tells you in those generic coaching courses: The reason your clients relapse isn't because you're not good enough. It's not because you need another certification or more motivational techniques.

It's because you're missing the ONE thing that separates $150-per-hour coaches from $500-per-hour transformation specialists: a proprietary, measurable protocol that creates neurological change - not just emotional breakthroughs.

Think about it: When your client feels amazing after a session but reverts to old patterns two months later, what actually failed? The traditional coaching model failed. Because it's built on outdated assumptions about how humans change.

Neuroscience now proves that lasting transformation requires measurable shifts in nervous system regulation - specifically Heart Rate Variability (HRV). Without addressing the neurological patterns that drive behavior, you're just putting Band-Aids on deep wounds. And your clients - and your bank account - pay the price.", "headline": "If You've Tried ICF Certification, NLP Training, or Life Coach Academy Programs - and Still Can't Justify Premium Pricing or Keep Clients Transformed..."}, "subheadline": "Stop losing clients to relapse and discount pricing wars. Finally differentiate yourself with a proprietary, science-backed system that produces lasting transformations your clients can measure and feel.", "testimonials": [{"headline": "Finally Charging What I'm Worth", "location": "Toronto, Canada", "name": "A former corporate manager turned coach", "quote": "I was stuck at $125 per session for two years. After getting certified in the Mind-Heart Activation Protocol, I immediately raised my rates to $450 per session - and my close rate actually improved because I could finally show clients measurable results. In 90 days I tripled my income."}, {"headline": "My Clients Actually Stay Transformed", "location": "Austin, Texas", "name": "A certified life coach", "quote": "Before this system, 60% of my clients would relapse within 8 weeks. It was heartbreaking and made me question if I was cut out for coaching. Now with the HRV tracking and nervous system protocols, my clients maintain their transformations long-term. I finally feel like a real professional."}, {"headline": "No More Imposter Syndrome", "location": "Sydney, Australia", "name": "A wellness coach", "quote": "I had three different coaching certifications but still felt like a fraud when prospects asked what made me different. The Mind-Heart Activation Protocol gave me a proprietary system I could point to with confidence. It completely changed how I show up in sales conversations."}, {"headline": "From 5 Clients to Full Practice in 16 Weeks", "location": "London, UK", "name": "An aspiring transformation coach", "quote": "I was working with 5 clients at $150 per session and barely covering my expenses. The business launch kit showed me exactly how to position myself, price premium, and fill my practice. Four months later I'm fully booked at $500 per session with a waitlist. This system changed everything."}], "timeSavingBenefit": {"content": "Most aspiring coaches spend years cobbling together systems, creating session plans from scratch, and figuring out pricing and positioning through expensive mistakes.

The average coach invests $15,000-$30,000 in certifications and business coaching before they figure out what actually works. And they lose 3-5 years of income during the learning curve.

The Mind-Heart Activation Protocol gives you the shortcut: a complete, proven system that's already produced results for hundreds of coaches. You get everything in 12 weeks that takes others years to build.

The methodology? Developed over a decade and tested with 10,000+ client sessions. The business systems? Refined through hundreds of successful coach launches. The positioning strategies? Proven to justify $400-$600+ per session fees.

You bypass the trial-and-error phase entirely and start with a professional practice on day one. That's worth years of your life and tens of thousands of dollars in mistakes avoided.", "headline": "Save Yourself 3-5 Years of Trial-and-Error: Get the Complete Practice-Building System That Took a Decade to Develop"}, "uniqueMechanismIntro": {"content": "What if you could offer clients something no other coach in your market can provide? A proprietary protocol that produces measurable, lasting results they can see on their phone - not just 'feel' in the moment?

The Mind-Heart Activation Protocol isn't another coaching framework. It's a complete certification system that gives you three unfair advantages:

First, a science-backed methodology that addresses the neurological root of behavioral patterns using Heart Rate Variability (HRV) biofeedback. Your clients don't just gain insight - they measurably shift their nervous system regulation in real-time.

Second, a step-by-step client transformation system that prevents relapse. Not loose concepts you have to figure out yourself - but a complete 12-session protocol you can deploy immediately with detailed scripts, assessments, and progress tracking.

Third, a done-for-you business launch kit that positions you as a certified specialist - not another generic life coach. Complete with pricing strategies, consultation scripts, marketing templates, and client onboarding systems that justify $400-$600 per session fees.

This isn't just a methodology. It's your complete practice-in-a-box that finally lets you stand out, charge what you're worth, and create transformations that last.", "headline": "Introducing the 'Mind-Heart Activation Protocol': The Only Coaching System That Combines Neuroscience, HRV Biofeedback, and a Complete Client Business Model"}, "whyOldMethodsFail": {"content": "The coaching industry sold you a lie: 'Get certified, hang your shingle, and clients will pay you what you're worth.'

But here's the brutal truth Sarah already knows: There are 71,000 certified coaches competing for the same clients. Most charge between $100-$200 per session. And 80% of them will quit within 3 years because they can't differentiate themselves or justify higher fees.

The 'standard' approach - active listening, powerful questions, goal-setting frameworks - makes you completely replaceable. Your clients can get that from a $29 Tony Robbins course or a free YouTube video.

Worse, these generic methods don't produce lasting results. Research shows that 73% of coaching clients relapse within 90 days when using traditional coaching models. Why? Because those models create insight and motivation - but they don't rewire the nervous system patterns that control behavior.

Without measurable, neurological change, you can't prove transformation. Without proof, you can't justify premium pricing. Without premium pricing, you're trapped in a volume game you'll never win. It's a vicious cycle that keeps brilliant coaches like you stuck at the bottom of the market - working too hard for too little.", "headline": "Why Following 'Standard' Coaching Best Practices Actually Keeps You Broke (and Your Clients Stuck)"}}
